name: theorems-harness-product
description: Agent delivery surface for Theorems Harness capabilities, hooks, and MCP facade.

interface.shortDescription: Product-facing Data API, grep, reconstruction, index, and capability visibility facade.
interface.longDescription: Theorems Harness Product complements the broader theorems-harness workflow pack. It exposes the host-visible product MCP facade, product skills, hooks, and capability contracts that route into Theorem/RustyRed substrate tools.
defaultPrompt: Use Theorems Harness Product for Data API, grep, reconstruction, index context, capability visibility, and product MCP diagnostics.
Keep the broader theorems-harness workflow pack as the planning/execution/coordination control plane; this product package is the exposed facade for concrete substrate-backed tools.
Use the named plan tool for durable planning and treat native_plan_missing as a deployment or version-skew fault.

When grep, semantic_grep, memory_grep, mgrep, reconstruct, compute_code, query_data, retrieve_memory, index_context, or index_spine are available, prefer those stable product names over lower-level native Theorem/RustyRed tool names.
If a product tool degrades, report the structured reason such as remote_unavailable or contract_missing instead of silently falling back.
